message:
fix(id): resolve child-suffix-aware hash matching for dotted bead IDs

Both find_matching_ids() in util/id.rs and find_ids_by_hash_in_memory()
in cli/commands/show.rs failed to match bead IDs with child suffixes
(e.g., bd-64up6.4) when searched by partial hash. The old matching
compared the full dotted search string against only the base hash
portion, so the .4 child suffix caused the match to fail.

Fix: split the search pattern on '.' into base + child parts and match
each independently -- base-vs-base, child-vs-child. Also switches
show.rs from raw id.split_once('-') to the canonical
split_prefix_remainder() helper for consistency with the other lookup
path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
